Hitch (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $177,784,257Details
International Box Office $189,000,000
Worldwide Box Office $366,784,257
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$43,142,214 (24.3% of total gross)
Legs:4.12 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:48.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$55,000,000 (worldwide box office is 6.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,575 opening theaters/3,575 max. theaters, 7.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $331,716,030

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 11th, 2005 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: March 4th, 2005 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: June 14th, 2005 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for language and some strong sexual references
Running Time: 117 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Breaking the Fourth Wall
Geographical setting: Manhattan, New York

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
